what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Archers, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Nomdara Caravan.
what_they_refuse: Kelvi Reedstring refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.

how_they_can_help: Kelvi Reedstring can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.

rumor_about_them: People say Kelvi Reedstring is Deck-archer hired to keep raiders and extortion crews off lightly armored convoy craft. and rarely acts without a second motive.

social_texture: Kelvi Reedstring speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Nomdara river caravans, people read them as trade-fluent, mobile, and instinctively alert to changing leverage.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to credit and supply; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but contract dishonor becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Kelvi touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Kelvi Reedstring when the party needs a socially grounded face for Nomdara river caravans: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
